description: Improvements-graph concept manifest, derived from 05-improvements.tex. Each concept prereqs >=1 paper-graph node (the thing extended) plus foundation nodes. paper:<NN> refers to a node in ../paper/manifest.json.

concepts.title: Control-Variate Drift Correction
concepts.summary: SCAFFOLD-style local step g_local - c_k + c cancels the eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k) drift; prototype: 1.62x fewer non-IID rounds. Validation: proofs/heterogeneity-control-variate.tex.

concepts.title: Unbiased Aggregation Estimators
concepts.summary: Horvitz-Thompson / size-proportional sampling restore exact unbiasedness lost by the self-normalized n_k/m_t average under imbalance. Validation: proofs/unbiased-aggregation.tex.

concepts.title: Adaptive Local-Work Schedule
concepts.summary: Decay E (or grow B) over rounds like a learning rate to dodge the large-E plateau; prototype beats every fixed E. Validation: improvements/adaptive-local-work.py measure().

concepts.title: Compute-Accounting Pareto (design)
concepts.summary: Measure the unquantified 'computation is free' premise: report a rounds-vs-total-on-device-compute Pareto frontier. Design proposal (E.2); link-only.

concepts.title: Permutation-Aligned Averaging (Git Re-Basin for FL)
concepts.summary: Align client models modulo permutation before averaging to relax the shared-init requirement; prototype flips barrier +0.024 -> -0.023. Validation: proofs/permutation-aligned-averaging.tex.

concepts.title: Federated LoRA (design)
concepts.summary: Run FedAvg over LoRA adapters only: per-round communication drops from Theta(B) to Theta(rank*dim) (4.3% in the sandbox). Design proposal (T.2); link-only.

edges_note: paper:<NN> = cross-graph edge into ../paper/manifest.json; URL prereqs point into the foundations repo. Topological order 01..06.
